name: Envenomed Snare
description:
This snare is coated with giant wasp venom and tipped with needles, which deliver the venom to the first creature to enter the square. That creature takes 4d6 piercing damage (DC 23 Reflex check) and, on a failure, the creature is exposed to the Giant Wasp Venom.

Craft Requirements Supply 2 doses of giant wasp venom.
